author: Anca Calmuschi
content: Very professional guys.... punctual, quick, good prices, definitely will use them again! Cheers guys!

author: Indra Kaneson
content: Very professional guys..very responsive, quick, affordable prices and hard working. Definitely will use them again!

author: Abdul Rashid
content:
Farouk did a brilliant job and knows his stuff. very professional and helpful. 
thank you so much for your brilliant work and will definitely be using your services again.

author: Fathima Farween
content: Farouk saved my day today. I didnt have any plug points working and had no way of giving breakfast to my kids! Like an Angel he came and sorted everything on a Sunday morning. He sorted our main trip switch and fixed everything. Will definitely recommend and 💯 reliable and professional Thank you FK.

author: Chris Webb
content: Great service as always, have always used Fahro in the past and will continue to do so! Would recommend FK Electrical to anyone for gas or electric work.

author: Mo Balkan
content: I’ve used Farooq for a few years now and honestly I can’t fault the guy! Always on time, punctual, and gets the job done without any hassle involved. Any time, any place he gets it sorted and I can’t recommend him enough.

author: Petr Dvorsky
content:
Fahro has provided an excellent service throughout, very polite, punctual, clean and professional. He installed the Tado smart heating system in our home and changed the manual valves to the thermostatic valves in order for the smart system to work.

I fully recommend Fahro and FK electrical and gas services and will certainly used them again.

author: Emma K
content: Great service fixing in a new tap, servicing my boiler and fixing my shower quickly after initial enquiry. You can tell Farooq knows what he’s doing and will even give helpful advice on managing appliances. Seems like an honest man, will definitely recommend him and use his services in future.

author: Kayode Akinwande
content: Great service provided by Fk Electrical & Gas Services. I've used them for all my rental property portfolio for many years, and am always delighted with the quality workmanship. Highly recommended and great customer service. My go-to Electrical and Gas contractor.

author: Enes Sistek
content: A few years ago I bought a house and my friend recommended me this company. They did full rewiring and I was very satisfied with the service. After that, the company also helped me with a few jobs and recently they did wiring in my loft. Very professional and honest company.

author: Amina Persaud
content:
FK Electrical and Gas Services did the entire refurb of our en suite. They were always on time, reliable and got the work done to a high standard in a reasonable time.
I wouldn’t hesitate to use this company again and have recommended them to everyone who has seen my new en-suite and loved it!

author: Edwin Gbeddy
content: Provided an excellent service as my boiler needed a replacement part. He went the extra mile, and got the replacement part within a few hours and got the job done. Great service.

author: Olawade Esan
content: The company does excellent work and I will recommend them over and over again. I've used them for both electrical and plumbing work and they were great on both occasions.

author: Fahim Khan
content: I recently hired an electrician for some wiring work, and I couldn't be happier with the service! They arrived on time, were incredibly knowledgeable, and completed the job efficiently. The work was high-quality, and they left the area clean. Highly recommend for anyone in need of reliable electrical services!

author: Shanawaz Ali
content: Excellent service, fast,friendly,and local trades. Faruk was very understanding and reliable. Amazing customer service and a job well done very quickly. Thanks you and will use your service again!

author: Dolly Mead
content:
I couldn't be more satisfied from the moment I called the service was outstanding—quick to respond and highly efficient.

He arrived on time, assessed the problem thoroughly, and provided a clear explanation of the necessary repairs. The work was completed promptly and expertly, leaving everything clean and tidy.

I’ve used them for both plumbing and electrical issues, and the quality of service was top-notch. I’ve saved his number on speed dial for any future issues!

author: Kayleigh Lewis
content: Fahro was really quick to respond, friendly and professional. We had a gas leak related to our cooker/hob, he found it straight away and clearly knew what he was doing, he did the job very well. Would recommend.

author: Fabiano Pinelli
content:
I have used Fk Electrical & Gas Services for fixing my boiler problems and installing a new equipment system.
Well recommended, Mr Fahro, was very professional and helpful.
Thank you 😊

author: Wale Ogunsan
content: I am happy with the boiler job and was satisfactory, and from the previous typically customer feedback, and follow-up surveys, your job has shown specific comments and ratings from the customers. This as provide more insight into your satisfaction level.

author: Hannah Woodfield
content: Called in the evening with trouble connecting new oven, came over within the hour and all sorted! Great fast service! Highly recommend

author: Tom Ongetta-Dagnoni
content: Excellent service. Engineer came out quickly and was able to diagnose the fault within a few minutes. Look forward to using FK again and would highly recommend.

author: Brett Larrett
content:
This man was so friendly and very hands on new exactly what he was doing called and was seen very quickly even help me move my cooker outside has i couldn’t do it . Cheap prices
I would definitely recommend this man to anyone such an amazing Service and very kind and friendly people . He done such a wonderful job on my cooker and I would go to this man again has I have saved he number and has a mum I’m happy use this man again to do the hardy work for me spoke and explained everything to me very well he was very lovely and respectful and has I said I truthfully, do recommend this electrician again not only that he does other stuff that’s good like locks and other bits and bobs and the man time keeping is really good and told me 2pm and got to me in the morning always happy to fit people in even if there busy such good man
Good person. And trust me it true thank you so much

author: Patricia M
content: Highly recommend FK! When our boiler broke down we had a few trades mess us around (e.g not turning up). A friend recommended Faruk and I am glad we used him. His communication and service was excellent and very competitive prices.
